28 #ifndef ROSCPP_EXCEPTIONS_H
29 #define ROSCPP_EXCEPTIONS_H
30 
31 #include <ros/exception.h>
32 
33 namespace ros
34 {
35 
39 class InvalidNodeNameException : public ros::Exception
40 {
41 public:
42  InvalidNodeNameException(const std::string& name, const std::string& reason)
43  : Exception("Invalid node name [" + name + "]: " + reason)
44  {}
45 };
46 
51 class InvalidNameException : public ros::Exception
52 {
53 public:
54  InvalidNameException(const std::string& msg)
55  : Exception(msg)
56  {}
57 };
58 
63 class ConflictingSubscriptionException : public ros::Exception
64 {
65 public:
66  ConflictingSubscriptionException(const std::string& msg)
67  : Exception(msg)
68  {}
69 };
70 
74 class InvalidParameterException : public ros::Exception
75 {
76 public:
77  InvalidParameterException(const std::string& msg)
78  : Exception(msg)
79  {}
80 };
81 
85 class InvalidPortException : public ros::Exception
86 {
87 public:
88  InvalidPortException(const std::string& msg)
89  : Exception(msg)
90  {}
91 };
92 
93 } // namespace ros
94 
95 #endif

ros::InvalidPortException
Thrown when an invalid port is specified.

ros::InvalidParameterException
Thrown when an invalid parameter is passed to a method.

Thrown when a second (third,...) subscription is attempted with conflicting arguments.

Thrown when an invalid graph resource name is specified to any roscpp function.
